mnemonics: Please Do Not Throw Sausage Pizza Away (Layers: Physical, Data Link, Network, Transport, Session, Presentation, Application)
All People Seem To Need Data Processing (Layers: Application, Presentation, Session, Transport, Network, Data Link, Physical)
TCP/IP Suite: Aunt Tillie Never Puts Raspberries In Vinegar (Layers: Application, Transport, Network, Physical, Routing, Internet, Various)
keyPoints: The OSI model has 7 layers, while the TCP/IP model has 4 layers
The Transport layer is responsible for end-to-end communication and error recovery
The Network layer handles logical addressing and routing between networks
commonMistakes: Confusing the Data Link layer (MAC addresses) with the Network layer (IP addresses)
Thinking TCP and IP are both at the same layer (TCP is Transport, IP is Network)
Believing the OSI model is actually implemented in real networks (it's a conceptual framework)
